entities.student_1: a girl writing in a notebook
entities.empty_desk: an empty desk with an open textbook and a pencil case

scenes.title: The Empty Desk
scenes.background_prompt: A classroom with rows of wooden desks, a whiteboard at the front, a world map on the wall, and sunlight from tall windows. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A bright classroom with sunlight streaming through tall windows. Rows of wooden desks face a whiteboard at the front. A girl with a long black braid in a white blouse sits at a desk in the front row, writing carefully in a notebook. Behind her, a boy in a blue polo shirt raises his hand high, looking at the front of the room with an eager expression. Between them, one desk is conspicuously empty — but it is not abandoned. An open textbook lies flat on the desk surface, a colorful pencil case sits beside it unzipped with pens visible inside, and a backpack hangs from the chair. Someone was clearly sitting here and has just left. A world map is pinned to the wall beside the whiteboard, and a clock above reads 10:15 AM.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place student_1 at a front desk, sitting and writing carefully in a notebook. Place student_2 at a desk behind her, sitting and raising his hand eagerly. Leave one desk between them empty but with an open textbook, unzipped pencil case, and a backpack hanging from the chair.
